inputs.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm hizmetler genelinde aylık toplam bulut altyapı maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Gesamtkosten der Cloud-Infrastruktur über alle Dienste hinweg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût mensuel total de l'infrastructure cloud tous services confondus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo mensual total de infraestructura en la nube en todos los servicios.

inputs.label: Average Compute Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de utilización promedio de cómputo

businessContext_i18n.en: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm bilgi işlem örnekleri genelinde ortalama CPU/bellek kullanımı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utilisation moyenne du processeur/mémoire sur toutes les instances de calcul.
businessContext_i18n.es: Utilización promedio de CPU/memoria en todas las instancias de cómputo.

inputs.label: Storage Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yetim kalmış, kullanılmayan veya aşırı sağlanmış depolamanın tahmini yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Prozentsatz des Speichers, der verwaist, ungenutzt oder überdimensioniert ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage estimé de stockage orphelin, inutilisé ou sur-provisionné.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de almacenamiento huérfano, no utilizado o sobreaprovisionado.

inputs.label: Idle Resource Count
inputs.businessContext: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 7 günden uzun süredir boşta olan bilgi işlem örneği sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Compute-Instanzen, die länger als 7 Tage im Leerlauf waren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'instances de calcul inactives depuis plus de 7 jours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de instancias de cómputo que han estado inactivas por más de 7 días.

inputs.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
inputs.businessContext: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık toplam giden veri aktarım hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de transfert de données sortant par mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de transferencia de datos saliente por mes.

inputs.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ayrılmış veya tasarruf planları tarafından karşılanan bilgi işlem harcaması yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Compute-Ausgaben, die durch reservierte oder Sparpläne abgedeckt sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des dépenses de calcul couvert par des instances réservées ou des plans d'économies.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del gasto en cómputo cubierto por planes reservados o de ahorro.

inputs.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
inputs.businessContext: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örnek türü ayarlamalarından potansiyel tasarrufu gösteren toplam puan (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aggregierter Score (0-100), der potenzielle Einsparungen durch Anpassungen des Instanztyps anzeigt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score agrégé (0-100) indiquant les économies potentielles liées aux ajustements de type d'instance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntaje agregado (0-100) que indica el ahorro potencial de ajustes de tipo de instancia.

inputs.label: Cloud Provider
inputs.businessContext: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyet analizi için birincil bulut sağlayıcısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Principal fournisseur cloud pour l'analyse des coûts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Proveedor de nube principal para el análisis de costos.

rules.message: Extremely low utilization with high spend – immediate rightsizing review recommended.
Storage waste exceeds 50% – initiate storage lifecycle policy.
High number of idle resources – automate shutdown or decommission.
Low reserved instance coverage with high spend – consider purchasing reservations.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
